posts.content:
This very nice paper provides some useful pushback against PRH.

To me science is like a damped pendulum, where we need to swing back and forth a few times before converging on truth.

So don't worry PRH fans, I'll be trying to swing us back out of the cave again soon!

interestSummary: Phillip Isola is currently focused on the dynamics of scientific consensus, particularly pushing back against perceived hype in generative model research, as seen in his engagement with a paper critical of "PRH" and his metaphor of science as a damped pendulum seeking truth.
